title: AI Innovation Hackathon 2026
description: A 48-hour hackathon focused on building AI-powered solutions for real-world problems. Teams will collaborate, innovate, and pitch their ideas to investor judges.

title: Startup Founders Workshop: Go-to-Market Strategy
description: Learn proven strategies for launching and scaling your startup. Expert speakers will share insights on market entry, customer acquisition, and growth hacking.

title: Tech Demo Day Q3 2026
description: Showcase your product to investors, partners, and the tech community. Demo Day features 20 selected startups pitching their latest innovations.

title: Pitch Day: Series A Ready Startups
description: A specialized pitch event for Series A-ready startups. Connect with tier-1 VCs and institutional investors looking for growth-stage opportunities.

title: Startup Networking Mixer - July
description: Casual networking event for founders, mentors, and investors. Great opportunity to make new connections and discuss collaboration opportunities.

title: Mentorship Session: Product-Market Fit
description: One-on-one mentorship focused on achieving and validating product-market fit. Learn from experienced founders and product leaders.

title: HealthTech Innovation Summit 2026
description: Industry conference bringing together healthcare innovators, investors, and policy makers. Keynotes, panel discussions, and networking opportunities.

title: Q2 2026 Investor Meetup
description: Regular meetup for angel investors and VCs to discuss market trends, deal flow, and investment strategies. Closed event for accredited investors.
